runner_selection_rationale: DL-12 Maestro-default category: primarily a black-box user journey; setup via public app entry (clearState launch); assertions are user-observable (golden-records screen + seeded list visible); no RN internals/sync/state-reset needed.
app_build_ref: apps/mobile built RN binary (pending-live: no build available in this env)
flake_policy_ref: DL-10/DL-12: deterministic failure hard-blocks; rerun is diagnostic only, never erases a prior failure
evidence_consumer: verification runner / build / ship / I-23 end-to-end witness
